response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced engineer with strong craftsmanship practices, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus academic work, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — RIDE Capital was fintech-adjacent but built on Node/TypeScript. His recent decade is web and full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing expertise
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers at Dunnhumby)
Broad polyglot background with some professional C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 years
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and performance systems background
